pages.text: You can use multiple PreFabs to create complex, modular production chains.$(br2)Each PreFab operates independently with its own state machine.

pages.title: Chained PreFabs
pages.text: $(bold)Pattern:$() Output from PreFab A → Input to PreFab B$(br2)$(bold)Setup:$()$(br)[PreFab A PUSH] → [Intermediate Chest] → [PreFab B PULL]$(br2)Each PreFab can be in CACHED independently.

pages.title: Example: Modular Iron
pages.text: $(bold)PreFab A:$() Ore Processing$(br)- Input: Iron Ore$(br)- Output: Iron Dust$(br2)$(bold)PreFab B:$() Smelting$(br)- Input: Iron Dust + Coal$(br)- Output: Iron Ingot$(br2)Connect with intermediate chest.

pages.title: Organization Tips
pages.text: $(li)Use $(l:importers_exporters/frequency_system)Frequency System$() to name gates$(li)Color-code chests (blue=input, red=output)$(li)Place signs on chests$(li)Use larger chests (barrels) for high-throughput$(li)Balance rates between PreFabs
